---
title: "Education"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Education

:::{#hero-heading}

Colorado State University | Fort Collins, CO
P.S.M in Ecosystem Science & Sustainability | Jan. 2026 - Jun. 2027

Colorado State University | Fort Collins, CO
Certificate in Public Policy Analysis | Jan. 2025 - Jun. 2026

University of Minnesota Duluth | Duluth, MN
B.A in Environment, Sustainability, & Geography | Aug. 2018 - Dec. 2020

University of Minnesota Duluth | Duluth, MN
Certificate in Geographic Information Science | Aug. 2018 - Dec. 2020

University of Minnesota Duluth | Duluth, MN
Certificate in Sustainability Leadership | Aug. 2018 - Dec. 2020
